race.comment: GORGEOUS (11) ticks plenty of boxes third-up after jumping in grade with a sound seventh over 1100m at Scone in the LR Denises Joy. Will appreciate Nock's claim and at her top for this. Gets through the conditions and will prove hard to hold out. ALL THE WAY MAE (14) taken straight to the front second-up and never headed when she recorded slick figures for a dominant win over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Can go on with it here and run a strong 1100m. SIR LES (7) undefeated in two starts in easier class and looks up to this. Kept up to the mark with a Randwick trial placing over 1045m. Worth noting her dam was a swimmer. Top prospect. SHAGGY (3) resumes and can give plenty of cheek over this trip with Fitzgerald's 3kg claim. Was a recent trial winner over 800m at Gosford. Value prospect.
